## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 6.6 seconds per flight lower in Poland. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Lotnisko Warszawa-Radom (EPRA) (51.5 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Lotnisko Chopina w Warszawie (EPWA) (9.2 seconds per flight).
